candidates.description: When splitting child indices, removing range 0..max dropped one too few items. The fix changes to inclusive range 0..=max.
Transitioning tmp-node state from reader to writer failed to seek to end before writing, so writes could overwrite existing bytes.

candidates.message: fix panic when we have low memory
candidates.description: Recursion over tmp nodes assumed presence and unwrapped. Under low-memory flow, None is valid and should merge descendant updates instead of panicking.
A split-side computation fetched nodes from `children` instead of `reader.leafs`, causing wrong lookups and panic on missing entries.

candidates.message: Fix a division by zero when deleting trees
candidates.description: Tree-deletion sizing logic divided by `roots.len()` without guarding empty roots; fix returns early when roots is empty.

candidates.message: fix a panic at search time when the index is empty
candidates.description: Nearest-neighbor search did not handle empty item sets and could panic; fix adds an early empty-result return.

candidates.message: fix the number of tree nodes required per items
candidates.description: Tree generation stop condition used `(n_items - 1).max(1)` instead of `n_items`, producing incorrect target tree-node counts for small datasets.
Random fit selection removed by positional rank (`remove_smallest(idx)`) instead of the selected item id (`remove(item)`), desynchronizing sampled and remaining sets.

candidates.message: check for error when inserting elements in a tree
candidates.description: Recursive insertion continued after an error was already queued, causing additional failures/stalls; fix short-circuits when error channel is full.

candidates.message: fix a bug around multi-index metadata
candidates.description: Upgrade path matched metadata branch on `key.index` instead of `key.node.item`, so metadata records could be misrouted during migration.

candidates.message: Fix the broken update and test
candidates.description: Upgrade logic only rewrote split nodes when a flag was set. Item->tree conversion can require rewrite regardless, so stale split-node links remained.

candidates.message: stop panicking if we don't find the node to remove in the two last elements
candidates.description: Tmp-node removal searched only the last two entries, then panicked. Fix scans all trailing history so valid nodes are found outside that fixed window.
